---
title: Heavy Nested Lists
status: published
---

Complex deeply nested list structure:

- Level 1A
  1. Level 2A ordered
     - Level 3A bullet
       1. Level 4A ordered
          - Level 4A-1 bullet at depth 4
          - Level 4A-2 bullet at depth 4
       2. Level 4B ordered
     - Level 3B bullet
  2. Level 2B ordered
- Level 1B
  1. Level 2B-1 ordered
  2. Level 2B-2 ordered
     - Level 3B-2A bullet
     - Level 3B-2B bullet
       1. Level 4B-2B-1 ordered
       2. Level 4B-2B-2 ordered
  3. Level 2B-3 ordered

Another mixed sequence:

1. Ordered A
   - Bullet A-1
     1. Ordered A-1-a
        - Bullet A-1-a-i
        - Bullet A-1-a-ii
     2. Ordered A-1-b
   - Bullet A-2
2. Ordered B
   - Bullet B-1
   - Bullet B-2
     1. Ordered B-2-a
     2. Ordered B-2-b
        - Bullet B-2-b-i
        - Bullet B-2-b-ii
          1. Ordered B-2-b-ii-α
          2. Ordered B-2-b-ii-β
3. Ordered C

End of nested lists.
